periods.label: May 2026
periods.note: Data sourced from 2024–2025 annual reports; exchange rates as of 2025-01-01.

datapoints.summary: CBRE's EMEA guide reports London Cat B fit-out at £1,200–£3,000/m², with premium schemes in the West End commanding the upper range. Strong demand from financial and tech occupiers keeps costs elevated.
London Cat A (shell-and-core to basic mechanical/electrical completion) ranges from £600–£1,500/m² per CBRE. Costs vary significantly by specification level and building age.

datapoints.report_title: Knight Frank Office Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Knight Frank's guide places London Cat B at £1,300–£2,900/m², consistent with CBRE. The City and Canary Wharf financial districts trend toward the midpoint; creative/tech occupiers in Shoreditch or King's Cross may exceed the upper range.
Cushman & Wakefield report London Cat B office fit-out at £1,250–£2,800/m². Supply chain normalisation since 2023 has moderated price growth, though specialist joinery and AV systems remain elevated.
London prime retail fit-out (luxury flagships, West End) ranges £1,800–£4,500/m² according to CBRE, driven by bespoke fixtures, specialist lighting and high-end material specifications.

London hotel fit-out costs span £2,000–£6,000/m² for 4–5 star properties. CBRE notes that F&B and back-of-house areas sit at the lower end; luxury suite and lobby areas drive costs to the upper range.

Paris Cat B office fit-out is priced at €900–€1,800/m² in CBRE's EMEA guide. La Défense business district and central Paris arrondissements attract higher specifications. Costs have stabilised following 2022–2023 inflation.

Frankfurt Cat B office fit-out ranges €800–€1,600/m² per CBRE EMEA 2024. The city's banking and finance tenant base drives demand for premium floor plates; MEP and data infrastructure add to higher-end projects.

Munich Cat B fit-out costs track slightly above Frankfurt at €850–€1,700/m², according to CBRE, reflecting tighter labour availability in Bavaria and strong demand from technology and manufacturing occupiers.

Berlin Cat B office fit-out runs €700–€1,450/m² per CBRE's EMEA data. Lower land costs and a more diverse occupier mix keep Berlin below Frankfurt and Munich, though tech and media tenants push the upper range.

Amsterdam Cat B office fit-out costs €900–€1,700/m² per CBRE. The Zuidas financial district and Schiphol corridor attract international occupiers with higher-spec requirements. Sustainability and BREEAM compliance add 5–15% to base costs.

Madrid Cat B fit-out is priced at €650–€1,300/m² in CBRE's EMEA guide. The AZCA financial district and Campo de las Naciones attract multinationals with mid-to-high specifications. Spain remains one of the more cost-competitive European markets for fit-out.

Milan Cat B office fit-out ranges €700–€1,500/m² per CBRE. Porta Nuova and CityLife business districts drive higher specifications. Italian craftsmanship in joinery and finishes often adds a premium to client budgets versus Northern European markets.

Dublin Cat B fit-out costs €1,000–€2,000/m² according to CBRE, reflecting its status as a major European hub for US technology firms. Docklands IFSC and Silicon Docks command the higher range; construction labour remains tight post-pandemic.

Brussels Cat B office fit-out is €800–€1,600/m² per CBRE EMEA. EU institutions and international organisations are significant occupiers; government and public sector specifications tend toward the midpoint of this range.

Warsaw Cat B fit-out costs €450–€900/m² in CBRE's guide, making it one of Central Europe's most cost-competitive major markets. BPO/SSC occupiers and technology companies drive new-build demand; costs have risen ~15% since 2022 due to construction inflation.

Zurich Cat B office fit-out ranges CHF 1,200–2,500/m² per CBRE, making it one of Europe's most expensive fit-out markets. Financial services and pharmaceutical occupiers demand premium specifications. High labour costs and strict building regulations drive the upper range.

Stockholm Cat B office fit-out costs SEK 8,000–18,000/m² per CBRE. Sweden's strong sustainability requirements (BREEAM/Miljöbyggnad) add to base costs. The Norrmalm and Kista technology clusters attract the highest-spec occupiers.

Lisbon Cat B office fit-out is priced at €600–€1,200/m² in CBRE's EMEA guide. Growing technology and nearshore services sector is driving new demand; costs remain well below Western European averages, attracting occupiers relocating from higher-cost cities.

CBRE reports Dubai Cat B office fit-out at AED 2,800–6,200/m². DIFC and Downtown Dubai command the upper end; Business Bay and Tecom sit in the mid-range. Demand from financial services, technology and energy firms is keeping costs elevated in prime locations.

Dubai retail fit-out costs AED 3,500–8,000/m² per CBRE. Luxury retail in Dubai Mall and Mall of the Emirates reaches the upper range; F&B units and smaller retailers typically land in the AED 3,500–5,500 band.

Hotel fit-out in Dubai ranges AED 5,000–14,000/m² according to CBRE. 5-star and luxury properties in Palm Jumeirah, Downtown or JBR drive the upper end; business hotels and airport-adjacent properties sit in the AED 5,000–8,000 range.

datapoints.report_title: Cavendish Maxwell UAE Property Market Report 2024
datapoints.summary: Abu Dhabi Cat B office fit-out is priced at AED 2,200–5,000/m² by Cavendish Maxwell. Al Maryah Island and Reem Island financial districts command the upper range. Government and energy sector occupiers drive substantial demand.

Riyadh Cat B office fit-out costs SAR 900–2,800/m² per ValuStrat, with KAFD (King Abdullah Financial District) attracting premium specifications. Vision 2030 is driving a wave of corporate relocations and new-build activity, pushing mid-market costs upward.

Jeddah Cat B fit-out costs SAR 700–2,200/m² according to ValuStrat. The commercial districts of Al Hamra and Prince Sultan Road see the highest-spec occupiers. Costs are generally 15–25% below Riyadh reflecting lower land and labour pressure.

Doha Cat B office fit-out ranges QAR 1,500–4,000/m² per CBRE. Lusail City and West Bay financial district command upper-range costs. Post-FIFA World Cup 2022 infrastructure has improved supply chains and reduced lead times for imported materials.

Kuwait City Cat B office fit-out costs KWD 250–650/m² per ValuStrat. The oil and government sectors dominate the commercial market; specifications tend toward conservative fitouts with premium for private sector occupiers in Sharq and Salmiya districts.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Singapore Cat B office fit-out ranges SGD 1,100–2,700/m² per CBRE APAC. Raffles Place, Marina Bay and Tanjong Pagar prime financial district command the upper range. Demand from banking, technology and logistics firms remains robust; labour shortages persist post-pandemic.

datapoints.report_title: JLL Global Office Fit-Out Cost Guide 2025
datapoints.summary: JLL places Singapore Cat B fit-out at SGD 1,200–2,600/m². The Grade A market in CBD and one-north technology clusters is tight, and fit-out lead times have extended to 6–9 months for complex projects.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Hong Kong Cat B office fit-out costs HKD 9,000–22,000/m² per CBRE APAC. Central, Admiralty and Wan Chai command the upper range. Despite some softening in demand, Grade A office specifications remain among the highest in Asia Pacific.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Tokyo Cat B office fit-out ranges JPY 160,000–380,000/m² per CBRE APAC. Marunouchi, Shinjuku and Shibuya prime districts command the upper range. Japan's high specifications for earthquake resistance and MEP systems contribute to costs above the regional average.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Shanghai Cat B office fit-out costs CNY 2,500–7,000/m² per CBRE APAC. Pudong's Lujiazui financial district and Jing'an prime offices command the upper range. Domestic supply chains and competitive local contractors make China more cost-effective than comparable Asian gateway cities.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Beijing Cat B office fit-out ranges CNY 2,200–6,500/m² per CBRE. The CBD, Zhongguancun technology corridor and Finance Street command the upper range. Government and state-owned enterprise specifications tend toward the midpoint.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Mumbai Cat B office fit-out is priced at INR 6,000–15,000/m² per CBRE APAC. BKC (Bandra Kurla Complex) and Nariman Point command the upper range. In USD terms (~$72–$180/m²) India remains among the most cost-competitive major markets globally for office fit-out.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Bangalore Cat B office fit-out costs INR 4,500–12,000/m² per CBRE APAC. Whitefield and Outer Ring Road technology clusters are the primary demand drivers. Multinational technology firms typically specify the upper quartile of this range.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Bangkok Cat B office fit-out ranges THB 15,000–35,000/m² per CBRE APAC. Asoke, Silom and Sukhumvit Grade A buildings command the upper end. In USD terms (~$420–$980/m²), Bangkok is competitive against Singapore and Hong Kong for regional hub fit-outs.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Kuala Lumpur Cat B office fit-out costs MYR 600–1,500/m² per CBRE APAC. The KLCC and TRX (Exchange TRX) financial districts command the upper range. Malaysia's Ringgit pricing (~$132–$330/m² USD) makes it one of Southeast Asia's most cost-effective major markets.

Sydney Cat B office fit-out ranges AUD 1,400–3,500/m² per RLB's Q4 2024 Quarterly Cost Monitor. The CBD, Barangaroo and North Sydney command the upper range. Construction labour remains tight; prefabricated and modular fit-out solutions are increasingly adopted.

Melbourne Cat B office fit-out costs AUD 1,200–3,000/m² per RLB Q4 2024. CBD, Docklands and Southbank command the upper range. Melbourne typically runs 5–10% below Sydney on equivalent Grade A projects.

Brisbane Cat B office fit-out is AUD 1,100–2,800/m² per RLB. The 2032 Olympics and associated development is tightening the construction labour market. CBD North and South core areas see the highest demand and specifications.

Perth Cat B office fit-out ranges AUD 1,000–2,400/m² per RLB. Mining and resources sector occupiers are the dominant demand driver; specifications are generally functional rather than premium compared to east coast capitals.

Auckland Cat B office fit-out costs NZD 1,200–3,000/m² per RLB Q4 2024. The CBD core and Viaduct precinct command the upper end. Import dependency for many fit-out components adds 8–12 weeks lead time and exchange rate risk.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: CBRE North America reports New York City Cat B office fit-out at $1,900–$4,500/m². Midtown Manhattan and Hudson Yards command the upper range; Downtown and outer-borough locations trend toward the lower end. Union labour requirements add 20–35% to costs vs. non-union markets.

datapoints.report_title: JLL Global Office Fit-Out Cost Guide 2025
datapoints.summary: JLL's 2025 guide places New York Cat B at $2,100–$4,800/m², slightly above CBRE on high-spec occupiers. Financial services and law firms with premium specifications drive the upper range; technology occupiers increasingly opt for mid-range agile fits.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: San Francisco Cat B office fit-out costs $1,600–$4,000/m² per CBRE. Tech occupier preferences for open, collaborative spaces and high-spec amenities push costs. The Bay Area construction labour market remains among the tightest in the US.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Chicago Cat B office fit-out is $1,000–$2,800/m² per CBRE. The Loop and River North command the upper range; suburban office corridors (Rosemont, Schaumburg) land at the lower end. Union labour covers most downtown Chicago projects.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Los Angeles Cat B office fit-out ranges $1,200–$3,200/m² per CBRE NA. Century City, Playa Vista and Westside tech corridor command the upper range; media and entertainment tenants often specify extensive AV and production-grade infrastructure adding 10–20% to base fit-out costs.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Washington DC Cat B office fit-out costs $1,300–$3,200/m² per CBRE. The CBD and East End law-firm corridor drives the upper range; government and government-adjacent occupiers dominate the mid-range. Security and access-control specifications add cost for federal clients.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Boston Cat B office fit-out is $1,400–$3,500/m² per CBRE. Life sciences and biotech have been the dominant growth sector; lab-ready fit-out specifications at the upper range can reach $4,500+/m² when including specialist MEP and fume extraction systems.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Miami Cat B office fit-out ranges $1,000–$2,600/m² per CBRE. Brickell Financial Centre and the Design District attract premium specifications from financial services and luxury brand occupiers. Hurricane-rated glazing and impact specifications add to base costs.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Atlanta Cat B office fit-out costs $900–$2,200/m² per CBRE NA. Midtown and Buckhead command the upper range; suburban submarkets (Cumberland, Perimeter Center) are notably lower. Atlanta is one of the most cost-competitive major US markets for fit-out.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Dallas Cat B office fit-out is $850–$2,100/m² per CBRE. Uptown and Las Colinas command mid-to-upper range; suburban Plano and Frisco see strong technology occupier demand with cost-efficient fit-out specifications.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Houston Cat B office fit-out ranges $900–$2,300/m² per CBRE. Galleria and Energy Corridor submarkets drive demand from energy sector; specifications are typically functional with selective premium areas for client-facing and executive floors.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Toronto Cat B office fit-out costs CAD 1,400–3,500/m² per CBRE NA. Bay Street financial district and King West technology corridor command the upper range. Costs have risen significantly post-pandemic with construction labour shortages persisting across the GTA.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE North America Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Vancouver Cat B office fit-out is CAD 1,300–3,200/m² per CBRE. Downtown core and Broadway tech corridor drive demand from technology and resources occupiers. Sustainability certifications (LEED, BOMA BEST) are near-universal in new-build fit-outs.

São Paulo Cat B office fit-out ranges BRL 3,000–8,000/m² per Linesight. Faria Lima and Vila Olímpia financial districts command the upper range. Import dependencies on MEP equipment and high import duties add 10–20% compared to markets with local manufacturing supply chains.

Mexico City Cat B office fit-out costs $1,000–$2,800/m² (USD) per Linesight. Santa Fe and Polanco command the upper range; Insurgentes and Reforma mid-range. Nearshoring trend from US companies is driving strong demand and pushing up prime fit-out costs.

Bogotá Cat B office fit-out is $800–$2,200/m² (USD) per Linesight. El Chico and Salitre financial districts dominate demand from multinationals and domestic financial services firms. Currency fluctuation adds risk to cost plans for USD-denominated materials.

datapoints.report_title: Savills World Research — Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Johannesburg Cat B office fit-out ranges ZAR 4,000–10,000/m² per Savills. Sandton CBD and Rosebank command the upper range; Midrand and suburban nodes sit at the lower end. Import dependence for MEP and specialist items adds 15–25% FX exposure.

datapoints.report_title: Savills World Research — Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Cape Town Cat B office fit-out is ZAR 3,500–9,000/m² per Savills. The V&A Waterfront and Century City command the upper range. Technology and financial services occupiers are primary demand drivers; tourism-related hospitality fit-outs command premium at the upper range.

Lagos Cat B office fit-out costs $400–$1,200/m² (USD) per Linesight. Victoria Island, Ikoyi and Eko Atlantic command the upper range. Import dependence, port delays and forex volatility are significant cost risks; build programmes are typically extended to manage lead times.

Nairobi Cat B office fit-out ranges $300–$800/m² (USD) per Linesight. Westlands and the Upper Hill CBD attract the highest-spec occupiers. Nairobi is East Africa's most active fit-out market, driven by technology, financial services and NGO sector growth.

Accra Cat B office fit-out is $350–$950/m² per Linesight. Airport City and Cantonments command the upper range. West Africa's second-largest commercial property market; expatriate and multinational occupiers drive demand for higher-specification fit-outs.

datapoints.report_title: Turner & Townsend International Construction Market Survey 2024
datapoints.summary: Turner & Townsend's International Construction Market Survey 2024 places the global Cat B office fit-out range at approximately $600–$4,500/m² across all markets surveyed. The most expensive markets are Geneva, Zurich, London, New York and Sydney; most cost-effective are Central and Eastern Europe, South and Southeast Asia.

Arcadis International Construction Costs 2024 surveying 100 cities finds office fit-out spanning $500–$4,800/m² globally. Geneva tops the ranking as world's most expensive construction market; South Asian and African markets form the lowest cost tier. Cost inflation has moderated to 3–6% annually in most developed markets.

datapoints.report_title: Turner & Townsend International Construction Market Survey 2024
datapoints.summary: Turner & Townsend's ICMS 2024 reports data centre fit-out in the range $2,000–$12,000/m² globally, highly dependent on Tier rating (I–IV), power density, redundancy specification and cooling technology. Hyperscale fit-outs in Northern Europe and Singapore command the upper end.

London retail fit-out ranges from £1,000–£3,000/m² depending on fit level. Luxury flagship stores on Bond Street or Oxford Street command the upper range; mid-market high street fit-out sits around £1,200–£1,600/m².

datapoints.report_title: JLL Middle East Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Dubai retail fit-out costs are driven heavily by mall operator requirements and luxury brand standards. Prime mall locations (Dubai Mall, Mall of the Emirates) command USD 2,000+/m²; mid-market retail sits around USD 800–1,200/m².

datapoints.report_title: Cushman & Wakefield Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Singapore retail fit-out ranges from SGD 950–3,000/m² (USD 700–2,200). Orchard Road prime retail and Marina Bay luxury brands drive the upper end; neighbourhood centres and heartland malls sit in the lower range.

datapoints.report_title: Cushman & Wakefield Australia Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Sydney retail fit-out ranges AUD 1,400–4,000/m² (USD 910–2,600). Pitt Street Mall and CBD premium flagships command the upper range; suburban retail fit-out is substantially more affordable.

New York luxury retail fit-out — particularly Fifth Avenue, SoHo, and Madison Avenue flagships — can exceed USD 4,000/m². Standard mid-market retail in Manhattan typically runs USD 1,100–1,800/m², with luxury spending multiples higher.

London 5-star hotel fit-out typically costs £2,000–£6,000/m² for guestrooms, with F&B and lobby spaces often significantly higher. Ultra-luxury schemes in Mayfair can push well above this range. Budget/economy hotel fit-out sits at £800–£1,400/m².

Dubai 5-star hotel fit-out ranges USD 1,500–6,000/m², with ultra-luxury Burj Al Arab-tier schemes substantially higher. The GCC hospitality pipeline for 2024–2026 is driving strong demand, with premiums paid for FF&E and bespoke joinery.

datapoints.report_title: Knight Frank Asia Pacific Hospitality Fit-Out Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Singapore luxury hotel fit-out typically costs SGD 1,600–5,400/m² (USD 1,200–4,000). Integrated resorts (Marina Bay Sands, Resorts World Sentosa) benchmark at the upper end. Business hotels and mid-scale properties range SGD 1,600–2,500/m².

datapoints.report_title: CBRE US Hotel Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: New York luxury hotel fit-out costs USD 2,000–7,000/m². Manhattan 5-star hotel guestroom renovations typically run USD 3,000–5,000/m², with landmark properties or branded residences at the upper end. Economy hotel renovations start around USD 800–1,200/m².

datapoints.report_title: JLL Middle East Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Dubai Cat A office fit-out (shell to base mechanical, electrical, and plumbing completion) typically costs USD 350–700/m². Grade A buildings in DIFC and Business Bay benchmarks sit at the upper end, with older stock in established locations at the lower range.

datapoints.report_title: Cushman & Wakefield Asia Pacific Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Singapore Cat A office fit-out (shell to occupiable base condition) costs SGD 540–1,150/m² (USD 400–850). Grade A buildings in Marina Bay and Raffles Place are at the upper end; older CBD stock and decentralised locations are lower.

Paris Cat A office fit-out typically costs EUR 460–830/m² (USD 500–900). La Défense and the CBD (8th arrondissement) command the upper range; inner arrondissements outside the traditional business core are more cost-effective.

UK private hospital and clinic fit-out typically costs £2,000–£4,000/m² for specialist fit-out including medical gas, infection control, and specialist mechanical/electrical. NHS refurbishment benchmarks are lower; private sector premium facilities command the upper range.

datapoints.report_title: JLL Middle East Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: Dubai private healthcare fit-out costs USD 1,500–3,500/m² for clinic and hospital space. High humidity and infection-control requirements add complexity. The Dubai Health Authority licensing process sets minimum specification standards that underpin the cost floor.

Australian private hospital and healthcare fit-out costs AUD 3,100–6,900/m² (USD 2,000–4,500). Stringent infection-control, specialist medical gas, and Building Code of Australia (BCA) compliance requirements drive premiums over standard commercial fit-out.

datapoints.report_title: CBRE EMEA Data Centre Fit-Out Cost Guide 2024
datapoints.summary: London hyperscale and colocation data centre fit-out costs £4,700–£11,800/m² (USD 6,000–15,000), driven by power density, cooling infrastructure, and Tier III/IV resilience requirements. Shell-and-core conversion projects at legacy industrial sites add structural premiums.

datapoints.report_title: Knight Frank Asia Pacific Data Centre Market 2024
datapoints.summary: Singapore data centre fit-out is among the most expensive globally, reflecting the city-state's land scarcity, power costs, and strict MAS/IMDA compliance requirements. The moratorium on new data centre capacity (now partially lifted) has kept supply tight and costs elevated.
